name: evals
description: Evaluate and judge Claude analyst skills against each other using structured rubrics and an interactive eval harness.

skills.name: data-quality-judge
skills.description: Score N data analyst responses on data quality tasks using an absolute rubric. Derives challenge categories from the data itself — no manifest needed. Scores detection, depth, and handling independently per challenge and outputs a structured JSON leaderboard.
triggers: who did better on this dataset

skills.name: eval-harness
skills.description: Interactive React UI for blind A/B evaluation of analyst skills. Calls two analyst conditions in parallel on the same dataset, then runs a judge to derive challenges and score both. Renders per-challenge breakdowns, score charts, and full analyst responses.
